zh.lifeSummary: 當Marguerite de Valois於1295年出生在法國瑟-吉馬內豐泰布利奧時，她的父親Charles de Valois comte de Valois25歲，母親Marguerite d'Anjou23歲。她於1311年與Guy I de Blois-Châtillon在法國瑟-吉瓦沙吉格曼--萊也結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1342年7月在法國i萊-德-福朗斯瑟-吉馬內享年47歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Marguerite de Valois于1295年出生在法国瑟-吉馬內豐泰布利奧时，她的父亲Charles de Valois comte de Valois25岁，母亲Marguerite d'Anjou23岁。她于1311年与Guy I de Blois-Châtillon在法国瑟-吉瓦沙吉格曼--萊也结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1342年7月在法国i萊-德-福朗斯瑟-吉馬內享年47岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Valois
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Marcel, Andre, Henri, Normand, Alcide, Armand, Emilien, Gilberte, Gilles, Herve, Jacques, Lucien.
habitational name from (Le) Valois, the name of a few places in France, e.g. in Forez and Limousin.

nameMeanings.name: Marguerite
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of Margaret , also used in the English-speaking world, where its use has been reinforced by the fact that the name was adopted in the 19th century for a garden flower, a large cultivated variety of daisy. Margaret was earlier used in English as a dialect word denoting the ox-eye daisy, and the French equivalent was borrowed into English just in time to catch the vogue for deriving girls' names from vocabulary words denoting flowers. See also Daisy .

en.lifeSummary: When Marguerite de Valois was born in 1295, in Fontainebleau, Seine-et-Marne, France, her father, Charles de Valois comte de Valois, was 25 and her mother, Marguerite d'Anjou, was 23. She married Guy I de Blois-Châtillon in 1311, in Saint-Germain-en-Laye, Seine-et-Oise, France. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died in July 1342, in Seine-et-Marne, Île-de-France, France, at the age of 47.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Marguerite de Valois est née en 1295, à Fontainebleau, Seine-et-Marne, France, son père, Charles de Valois comte de Valois, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Marguerite d'Anjou, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Guy I de Blois-Châtillon en 1311, à Saint-Germain-en-Laye, Seine-et-Oise, France. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en juillet 1342, à Seine-et-Marne, Île-de-France, France, à l’âge de 47 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Marguerite de Valois 1295 in Fontainebleau, Seine-et-Marne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Charles de Valois comte de Valois 25 und ihre Mutter Marguerite d'Anjou 23. Sie hat 1311 in Saint-Germain-en-Laye, Seine-et-Oise, Frankreich Guy I de Blois-Châtillon geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb im Juli 1342 im Alter von 47 Jahren in Seine-et-Marne, Île-de-France, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Marguerite de Valois è nata il nel 1295 nel Fontainebleau, Seine-et-Marne, Francia, sua padre, Charles de Valois comte de Valois, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Marguerite d'Anjou, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato Guy I de Blois-Châtillon nel 1311, nel Saint-Germain-en-Laye, Seine-et-Oise, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel luglio 1342, nel Seine-et-Marne, Île-de-France, Francia, all'età di 47 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Marguerite de Valoisが1295年にフランスセアイネ-エト-マルンフォンティアイネブレアウで生まれた時，父Charles de Valois comte de Valoisは25歳，母Marguerite d'Anjouは23歳であった。1311年にフランスセアイネ-エト-オイゼサイント-ジャーメイン-エン-レイでGuy I de Blois-Châtillonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1342年7月にフランスiレ-デ-フランスセアイネ-エト-マルンで47歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Marguerite de Valois(이)가 1295년 프랑스 세이인-트-마니 폰테인블리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Charles de Valois comte de Valois(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Marguerite d'Anjou(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1311년 프랑스 세이인-트-이스 세인트-그맹--레이에서 Guy I de Blois-Châtillon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1342년 7월 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 세이인-트-마니에서 47세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Marguerite de Valois nasceu em 1295, em Fontainebleau, Seine-et-Marne, França, seu pai, Charles de Valois comte de Valois, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Marguerite d'Anjou, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com Guy I de Blois-Châtillon em 1311, em Saint-Germain-en-Laye, Seine-et-Oise, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em julho de 1342, em Seine-et-Marne, Île-de-France, França, com 47 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Marguerite de Valois родилась в 1295 г. в местности фонтеинебло, сине-ет-марн, Франция, её отцу по имени Charles de Valois comte de Valois было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Marguerite d'Anjou, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Guy I de Blois-Châtillon в 1311 г. в местности сеинт-гирмеин-ен-леи, сине-ет-оис, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла июль 1342 г. в местности сине-ет-марн, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция в возрасте 47 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Marguerite de Valois nació en 1295, en Fontainebleau, Seine-et-Marne, Francia, su papá, Charles de Valois comte de Valois, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Marguerite d'Anjou, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Guy I de Blois-Châtillon en 1311, en Saint-Germain-en-Laye, Seine-et-Oise, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en julio de 1342, en Seine-et-Marne, Île-de-France, Francia, a la edad de 47 años.
